feature_name: Dual-mode operation (Root Complex or End Point)
description: Controller supports RC or EP mode; selection via bootstrap or override. RC initiates config cycles, EP exposes Type 0 config space. Mode must be finalized before link training.
dependencies: PSC power enabled; DEVSTAT PCIe enable; valid SerDes refclk; configure before LTSSM enable

description: Supports 2.5 GT/s (Gen1) and 5.0 GT/s (Gen2). Control via Link Control 2/Port Logic GEN2. Verify negotiated speed after training and ensure PHY equalization for Gen2.
dependencies: Stable reference clock; SerDes PLL lock; common-clock/SSC settings consistent

feature_name: Link width x1/x2 with lane reversal and polarity inversion
description: Operates with x1 or x2 lanes. Supports automatic lane reversal and polarity inversion; down-training supported.
dependencies: SerDes lane enable configured; partner compatibility; PLL locked

description: Outbound windows map internal addresses to PCIe spaces for CPU/DMA. Program base/size then enable; use only after link-up.
dependencies: Program OB indices/size first; enable after config; link up required

description: Inbound regions expose internal memory via BAR selection and start/offset. Required for EP host access or peer writes.
dependencies: BAR sizing and host enumeration alignment; enable inbound translators

description: Select application endianness to match system architecture. Set before enabling translators and traffic to avoid corruption.
dependencies: Program endianness prior to OB/IB enable and DMA

feature_name: TLP attributes: Relaxed Ordering and No Snoop
description: Outbound TLPs can set Relaxed Ordering and No Snoop. Use when interconnect tolerates reordering and non-snoop paths.
dependencies: System memory ordering and cache policy must allow; measure impact

description: Supports INTA–INTD mapped to SoC interrupts. Requires proper masking, W1C semantics, and EOI completion.
dependencies: SoC interrupt routing; status/enable sequencing; EOI writes

description: As RC, receives MSIs from endpoints. Vectors grouped in enable/status blocks; W1C to clear pending.
dependencies: Enumeration must enable MSI on endpoints; SoC IRQ mapping

description: As EP, can generate MSI to host by programming local MSI and triggering. Host must allocate and enable vectors.
dependencies: MSI capability configured; host assigned vectors; valid BAR/IB regions

description: Supports device PM and ASPM L0s/L1. Enter/exit with quiesced traffic; L2 not supported.
dependencies: Stable link; partner support; follow timing for transitions

description: Dedicated interrupts for PME, turn-off ack, and reset events. Must enable, service, and clear to maintain responsiveness.
dependencies: SoC IRQ mapping; correct status clear order

description: AER provides detailed error logging; ECRC helps detect TLP corruption. Enable reporting and capture logs before clearing.
dependencies: AER capability present; interrupts routed; log buffers available

description: Program SerDes PLL and verify lock before training. Lane status aids SI/debug analysis.
dependencies: Stable refclk; kicker/unlock if required; observe delays

feature_name: Link training control and LTSSM monitoring
description: Enable LTSSM to start negotiation; monitor state until L0. Keep training disabled until config ready.
dependencies: SerDes locked; translators configured; link event interrupts set

description: Issue hot reset downstream after quiescing traffic. Enforce delays before resuming.
dependencies: RC role; traffic flushed; reset timing observed

description: Issue Type 0/1 config and I/O cycles via dedicated windows. Use single 32-bit, non-burst accesses and only when link is up.
dependencies: CFG_SETUP programmed; IOBASE set; target presence verified

description: Gate outbound/inbound translators with enables to stage bring-up and isolate faults. Disable before remaps.
dependencies: OB/IB tables valid; known link state; handlers ready

description: Per-lane PCS/SerDes controls for fine-grained debug and status. Use cautiously outside lab.
dependencies: SerDes powered; kicker unlock as needed

description: Wide internal buses enable high throughput. Controller special spaces require 32-bit, non-burst, non-cacheable accesses.
dependencies: MMIO attributes set to device/strongly-ordered; use helpers

description: Set common-clock bit when sharing refclk; SSC reduces EMI if both sides support. Mismatch can degrade Gen2 stability.
dependencies: Board clock topology known; SerDes/PL GEN2 configured

description: Power and configure SerDes, set endianness/translators/interrupts with LTSSM off. Enable LTSSM, wait for L0, then enumerate and enable MSI.
dependencies: PSC enabled; SerDes lock; timeouts/retries for robustness

description: Configure BARs, capabilities, and inbound windows; then enable LTSSM. After link, service host config and enable MSI.
dependencies: BAR sizes selected; IB/OB programmed; SerDes lock

description: No hardware hot-plug and no L2 link state support. Software must avoid relying on these features.
dependencies: Design policies avoid L2/hot-plug; use alternatives

feature_name: Payload and read request size limits
description: Outbound payload 128 B; inbound payload and read request up to 256 B. Program capability registers accordingly.
dependencies: Enumeration negotiates MPS/MRRS within limits

description: Inbound transactions carry priority/privilege IDs for QoS. Configure conservatively to avoid starvation.
dependencies: Align with SoC QoS/security policy

description: Activity and diagnostics registers aid performance tuning and troubleshooting. Follow non-burst access rules.
dependencies: Use only in low-impact windows; MMIO helpers

description: Small I/O aperture for legacy devices; many endpoints lack I/O space. Validate before relying on I/O.
dependencies: RC mode; endpoints advertise I/O BARs

description: Multiple VCs/TCs and function-level reset not supported. Do not advertise or depend on them.
dependencies: Constrain capability advertisement; clear unsupported bits
